_doc: A+ Type 2 — Multi-ASIN Parent. N child products dưới 1 parent ASIN. Default Plan A (Modular) vì niche này cần variant comparison + decision guide. Chưa verify end-to-end — schema form first, iterate khi có parent ASIN thật.

plan_A_modular._description: Modular formula optimized cho multi-ASIN: collection hero → shared pain → PRODUCT MATRIX (comparison grid) → DECISION GUIDE (which for you) → COLLECTION CTA. Thay vì 1 product deep-dive, bán VARIETY + RIGHT-FIT + BUNDLE.

modules.name: Collection Hero
modules.intent: Introduce cả collection cùng lúc — all N products in one warm family shot + parent brand headline. Buyer immediately sees range.

layout.top_30pct: Baloo BOLD parent brand headline + Calligraphy subhead tagline
layout.middle_55pct: Hero photo — all N products arranged lifestyle flat-lay OR standing together on shared surface (warm wood plank, soft pastel backdrop). Scale R3 per product, preserve F1-F8 mỗi product song song.
layout.bottom_15pct: Small Baloo product-family strip — N product names with tiny icons, aligned horizontally

modules.ref_recipe_strategy: Pass refs từ TẤT CẢ N child ASINs (1-2 refs per child, hero_faceon prioritized). Total refs = N×1 up to max 5.
modules.fidelity_enforcement: CRITICAL — parallel F1-F8 enforcement N lần. Prompt liệt kê explicit từng product name + preserve từng design.

seduction_gate.WHO: Buyer discovering the collection/brand for the first time
seduction_gate.PAIN: Single product feels limited, need range
seduction_gate.HOOK: All products visible at once — variety signal

modules.name: Shared Pain / Unified Promise
modules.intent: Chạm pain CHUNG mà cả collection giải quyết (not product-specific). Unifying theme.

layout.left_50pct: Relatable pain scene (soft, not dark) + Baloo BOLD headline capturing umbrella pain
layout.right_50pct: Transformation scene showing ANY product từ collection in positive use + Baloo solution statement

modules.ref_recipe_strategy: Right panel: 1-2 refs từ primary child ASIN (thường là best-seller). Left panel: no product refs needed.

seduction_gate.PAIN: Umbrella pain — e.g. 'raising confident kids in daily chaos'

modules.name: Product Matrix (Variant Comparison Grid)
modules.intent: Grid so sánh N products — dimensions, primary use-case, target age, material variation. Buyer picks right variant.

layout.top_15pct: Baloo BOLD headline 'Choose The One That Fits Your Family'
layout.middle_70pct: Grid N cells (2x2 if N=4, 1x3 if N=3, 1x4 if N=4 horizontal). Each cell: product photo (hero_faceon) + Baloo product name + 3-line Calligraphy spec list (size / use-case / age range)

modules.ref_recipe_strategy: REQUIRED — hero_faceon của TẤT CẢ N child ASINs. Mỗi cell refs riêng, ref catalog hierarchical.
modules.fidelity_enforcement: Mỗi cell MUST preserve F1-F8 của product tương ứng. Prompt viết section riêng cho mỗi cell.

seduction_gate.PAIN: Which variant is right for my kid/gift recipient

modules.name: Decision Guide (Which One For You?)
modules.intent: Guided matching: 'if your kid is X → pick variant Y'. Narrative flowchart hoặc 3-4 persona scenarios.

layout.top_10pct: Baloo BOLD headline 'Which Reward Tool Fits Your Stage?'
layout.middle_80pct: 3-4 persona cards horizontal. Each card: Calligraphy italic persona quote ('My toddler is potty training...') + arrow → Baloo BOLD product recommendation + small product thumbnail
layout.bottom_10pct: Baloo CTA hint: 'Not sure? Start with {most_universal_variant}'

modules.ref_recipe_strategy: Small thumbnail refs — hero_faceon của mỗi variant được recommend. Small size OK vì thumbnail context.

seduction_gate.PAIN: Buyer's remorse if pick wrong variant

modules.name: Collection CTA (Bundle + Brand Close)
modules.intent: Bundle promotion + brand story reinforcement. Drive cross-sell — 'buy the set' or 'start with one, grow into the family'.

layout.left_55pct: Gift-ready flat lay showing multiple products together trong 1 gift arrangement. Calligraphy 'A growing keepsake family.' overlay
layout.right_45pct: Solid accent block — Baloo BOLD 'Start With One. Collect The Family.' + body copy về brand story + dual CTA: 'Shop The Collection →' + 'Start With Best-Seller →' + 3 trust badges

modules.ref_recipe_strategy: Refs từ 2-3 child ASINs minimum (show collection), hero_lifestyle ưu tiên để có variety.

seduction_gate.WHO: Buyer ready + wanting to commit at collection level

plan_B_storyboard._description: Backup for multi-ASIN. Storyboard narrative với variant appearances across 5 modules. Harder to execute (N products require parallel fidelity + visual cohesion). Use only nếu brand ưu tiên emotional story hơn rational comparison.
plan_B_storyboard._when_to_use: Niche heavily emotional (memorial, wedding, anniversary collection) — comparison feels cold.
